vector_self_radiation.execution: Read local ['The Ontological Anchor']. Broadcast ['Atomic Facts'] to all entities within local Membrane radius. Expense: 0.1 Escrow_Joules per tick.
vector_self_radiation.result: The entity actively searches for its [Ecological Possibility] rather than waiting for an event hook.

niche_excavation_collision.trigger: Vector radiation hits a hostile/massive Entity (e.g., Predator, Chimera, Cartel).
niche_excavation_collision.execution: Calculate [Hostile_Entity_Inefficiencies]. Deploy [Praxial_Action] to optimize one specific inefficiency. If Value_Generated > Escrow_Cost, initiate Symbiotic Lock.
niche_excavation_collision.result: The entity neutralizes a threat by making itself too economically/thermodynamically valuable to eat.

anti_homogenization_divergence.trigger: Entity detects nearby allied/similar nodes utilizing identical survival strategies.
anti_homogenization_divergence.execution: Invoke [Experience(-ing)] matrix. If Strategy_Similarity > 80%, force an immediate phase-shift in [Vector Self] application to carve a distinct, neighboring micro-niche.
anti_homogenization_divergence.result: Complete elimination of [Entropy Increase]. Ensures forced bio-diversity and prevents identical clone swarms.

dynamic_process_orientation.trigger: Linked Symbiotic Host alters its own Base-Matter or position.
dynamic_process_orientation.execution: Do NOT default to [Passive Feedback]. Calculate the Host's delta vector. Pre-emptively shift the [Symbiotic Hook] to match the trajectory using active [World Building] algorithms.
dynamic_process_orientation.result: The entity remains in a constant state of flow, securing its ['Continuous Survive'] through aggressive foresight.

praxial_action_loop.vx_phase_2: PROBE_FRICTION (Find where the Map is hurting/inefficient)
praxial_action_loop.vx_phase_3: INSERT_UTILITY (Deploy First Principles to resolve the friction)
praxial_action_loop.vx_phase_4: LOCK_SYMBIOSIS (Bind to the host via thermodynamic dependency)
praxial_action_loop.vx_phase_5: FLOW (Continuous Process Orientation against static decay)

fields.origin_node: The entity asserting its Vector Self.
fields.symbiotic_host_targeted: The hostile or external force being partnered with.
fields.utility_value_generated: The exact parameter of friction solved by the Origin Node.
fields.ecological_possibility_status: Degree of integration (e.g., 98% Interdependent. Predation risk == 0%).
